# Voice Clock Time Speaker
> iOS talking clock — announces the time aloud hands-free at customizable intervals.

## Overview
Voice Clock Time Speaker is a focused utility app for iPhone and iPad that speaks the current time aloud at the intervals you choose. It is not a chatbot and not a smart assistant — it is a simple, reliable, battery-friendly talking clock that helps people with ADHD, visual impairments, or busy hands keep track of time without constantly checking their phone. Runs fully offline using on-device text-to-speech.

## Key Features
- Announces the time using natural native voices at intervals you configure
- Supports every-5-minute, every-15-minute, half-hourly, hourly, and custom-time announcements
- Offers 15+ languages including English, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Mandarin, Hindi, Arabic
- Runs fully offline — no internet connection required
- Minimal battery impact
- Scheduling support to limit announcements to specific hours
- Customizable voice settings and announcement style
- Supports Dynamic Type and designed alongside VoiceOver

## Who It's For
- People with ADHD who experience time-blindness and benefit from external time awareness
- Blind and low-vision users who need an independent audible time reference
- Remote workers and students who need passive time awareness during focused work
- Cooks, runners, lifters, and parents who need hands-free time cues
- Caregivers and elderly users who benefit from scheduled time reminders
- Meditators and teachers who want gentle, non-intrusive time prompts

## Accessibility
Voice Clock is accessibility-first. It is designed and tested alongside VoiceOver, supports Dynamic Type for large-text preferences, and is a core accessibility tool for visually impaired users who rely on audible time cues for independence. All core features are usable without looking at the screen.

## Platform
- iOS (iPhone and iPad), iOS 15 or later
- Price: Free with optional premium subscription
- Available in English and Japanese
